slices.summary: Proved the new workshop format doubled application rates, earning approval for monthly paperwork clinics at a church fellowship hall. Planned triage sheets, bring-lists, three outcome categories, and sustainable engineer hours with Miguel. Adopted an evidence-driven controlled-expansion mindset — let the first clinic expose real bottlenecks before pushing further.
open_loops: Which aspects of the first clinic will reveal unforeseen bottlenecks
Appointment-to-walk-in slot ratio needs real-world adjustment after the first sessions
How to bound Miguel's hours so they don't become a permanent dependency on one engineer
decisions: Build triage sheet, bring-list, and three outcome categories as the clinic's backbone tools
Reserve Miguel for technical-judgment questions only; compile common answers into a handbook to reduce dependency
Use hybrid appointment plus walk-in model to guarantee time for high-complexity cases
